nom: Boucle Littorale de Capu di Muru

header.title: Corse Capu di Muru phare.jpg
header.description: Capu di Muru and its lighthouse seen from the south, commune of Coti-Chiavari, Southern Corsica, France
header.author: Myrabella

header.title: Tour génoise de Capo di Muru (golfe d'Ajaccio, Corse-du-Sud).jpg
header.description:
This building is inscrit au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference PA00132603 .
